name: Sweetviz (EDA Report Generator)

performance.notes: Report generation; depends on dataset size; generates static HTML; fast for < 100k rows

agent_readiness.notes: One-line EDA report generation for pandas DataFrames. sweetviz.analyze(df) generates a rich HTML report with: distribution plots for each column, correlation heatmap, missing value analysis, target variable comparison, and train/test dataset comparison. compare(df1, df2) for dataset comparison. Outputs standalone HTML. Focused on comparison use case — excellent for ML train/test/production drift checks. Simpler than ydata-profiling.

gotchas: Static HTML output — no interactive drilling
Less comprehensive than ydata-profiling for detailed stats
best_when: Quick EDA before ML model training
Train/test dataset comparison for data leakage checks
Sharing dataset reports with non-technical stakeholders
Fast data quality overview in one line of code
avoid_when: Very large datasets (use ydata-profiling with minimal mode)
When detailed statistical analysis is needed
summary: Sweetviz generates beautiful one-line EDA HTML reports from pandas DataFrames. Distributions, correlations, missing values, and target analysis in seconds. Best feature: compare() for train/test dataset comparison to detect data leakage or drift. Simpler and faster than ydata-profiling for quick EDA. Outputs standalone HTML for easy sharing. One line: sweetviz.analyze(df).show_html().
